items.title: Try the viewer with sample data
items.body: On the home page, click Try with sample data to see what the viewer looks like with two weeks of fake sessions. No sign-in needed.

items.title: Plays nicely with Sleep As Android
items.body: Aorti can share your strap with sleep-tracking apps. No need to disconnect one to use the other.

items.title: Mobile reliability fixes
items.body: Recovers better from brief strap drops, including overnight. Long sessions use less battery.

items.title: Viewer tweaks
items.body: Chills sensitivity slider filters events properly. Sundays open in the week view. HR shifts show in purple so they don't look like chills.

items.title: Save CSV anywhere
items.body: Tapping Export CSV opens a save dialog, so the file goes wherever you pick.
